CustomField.description: The fully qualified Apex class name that implements the address verification interface. This class handles the callout to the external verification service and processes the response. Automatically set when selecting a verification service in NPPatch Settings. Custom implementations must implement the ADDR_IValidator interface.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Apex class that handles address verification callouts. Set automatically when configuring the verification service.
CustomField.label: Verification Service
